positive: Minimalist silhouette of a cosmic fox spirit (kitsune) surrounded by flowing nebulae and crystalline geometric patterns. The fox should be in a dynamic, ethereal pose, appearing to leap or glide. Use deep indigo, sapphire blue, magenta, and gold accents against a cosmic black void background. Strong contrast and clean edges are crucial. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau curves and futuristic sci-fi elements. Vector art quality, suitable for screen printing on dark apparel, centered composition, high resolution, high detail.
negative: blur, text, watermark, logo, artifact, noise, fuzzy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, grainy, signature, poorly drawn, messy
